hero.headline:
Ship Faster.
Grow Bigger.
hero.subheadline: Panther Express gives growing brands the logistics infrastructure they need — fast, reliable delivery, full shipment visibility, and a seller portal built for serious operators.

about.title: Built for Sellers Who Ship at Scale
about.description: Panther Express is a logistics and fulfillment partner for Egyptian e-commerce brands and growing merchants. We obsess over reliable delivery, operational simplicity, and giving you the real-time visibility you need to run a tight operation.
about.feature1Desc: Consistent, on-time delivery across Egypt — every shipment, every time.
about.feature2Desc: Track every order in real time. No blind spots, no guessing.
about.feature3Desc: From 10 shipments to 10,000 — our infrastructure grows with your business.
about.feature4Desc: Every feature we build starts with what makes your operations easier.

services.title: Everything You Need to Ship and Scale
services.subtitle: A complete logistics toolkit designed for merchants who take operations seriously.
services.item0Desc: Create individual shipments in seconds with full address and product details.
services.item1Desc: Upload hundreds of orders at once via Excel. Save hours of manual entry.
services.item2Desc: Public and private tracking for every waybill. Your customers always know where their order is.
services.item3Desc: Build a customer address book. Repeat orders in seconds.
services.item4Desc: Print professional shipping labels as PDF. Ready for any printer.
services.item5Desc: See your exact shipping rates by zone. No surprises on your invoice.
services.item6Desc: Wide delivery network across Egypt. Check if your customers' areas are covered.
services.item7Desc: Track your cash-on-delivery remittances, balances, and delivery performance in one place.

clients.title: Trusted by Growing Brands
clients.subtitle: From fashion to electronics — Panther Express powers shipments for brands across all categories.

partners.title: Built on Strong Partnerships
partners.subtitle: We work with trusted operational and strategic partners to deliver a seamless logistics experience.

branches.title: We Deliver Across Egypt
branches.subtitle: With branches in every major city and coverage in hundreds of areas, we make sure your customers can always receive their orders.

sellerHighlights.title: Your Operations Hub
sellerHighlights.subtitle: The Panther Express Seller Portal gives you everything you need to manage shipments, customers, and performance — all in one place.
sellerHighlights.feature0Desc: Submit new orders instantly from your dashboard.
sellerHighlights.feature1Desc: Upload 100s of orders from Excel in one click.
sellerHighlights.feature2Desc: Real-time status for every shipment in your account.
sellerHighlights.feature3Desc: Generate PDF labels for every order instantly.
sellerHighlights.feature4Desc: Save and reuse customer addresses. Ship repeat orders fast.
sellerHighlights.feature5Desc: View balances, COD remittances, and performance data anytime.

leadForm.title: Ready to Ship with Panther?
leadForm.subtitle: Tell us about your brand and we'll get you set up on the Seller Portal — usually within 24 hours.
leadForm.successMessage: We'll review your details and reach out within 24 hours to get you set up.
leadForm.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.
leadForm.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid Egyptian phone number
leadForm.volumeRequired: Please select your monthly shipment volume
leadForm.urlInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (starting with https://)
